response.original_title: Nura: Rise of the Yokai Clan
response.overview: Nura: Rise of the Yokai Clan (Nurarihyon no Mago) is a supernatural action anime following Rikuo Nura, a boy who is three-quarters human and one-quarter yokai. By day he is a normal student, but by night he transforms into a powerful yokai leader destined to succeed his grandfather as the head of the Nura Clan.
response.title: Nura: Rise of the Yokai Clan
